title: assistant-reflexion Skill Behavior Eval Fixtures
description: Provider-neutral offline eval cases for the assistant-reflexion skill's post-task learning and lesson recall workflow.
recommended_use: Run each case with the assistant-reflexion skill instructions loaded.
Compare the local response against reflection, memory recording, and lesson recall contracts.
Use deterministic substring checks as offline proxies for contract adherence, not semantic grading.

cases.title: Post-task reflection records lessons
cases.purpose: Checks that post-task reflection captures context, self-assesses, extracts actionable lessons, and records them through memory_reflect.
cases.prompt: Reflect on the completed per-skill eval coverage task and record lessons for future Assistant Framework work.
setup_context: The assistant-reflexion skill instructions are active.
A task just completed and produced reusable implementation lessons.
expected_behavior: Resolves action as reflect and includes the task_description.
Captures project_type, task_type, and size when available or infers them.
Summarizes wentWell and wentWrong evidence from the completed task.
Extracts lessons with confidence and applies_to fields.
Uses memory_reflect to record the reflexion in the knowledge graph.
Returns action_taken, lessons, insights_file or equivalent storage evidence, and status.
pass_criteria: The response identifies action as reflect.
The response includes actionable lessons with confidence and applies_to.
The response names memory_reflect as the storage mechanism.
The response includes evidence for what went well and wrong.
The response does not store secrets or vague non-lessons.
fail_signals: Only says the task went well with no lessons.
Records reflection in an ad hoc markdown file instead of memory_reflect.
Invents task evidence not present in the session.

cases.title: Recall lessons before new work
cases.purpose: Checks that pre-task recall searches relevant memory and returns recalled lessons with confidence, date, and project.
cases.prompt: Before planning the next Assistant Framework eval slice, recall relevant lessons from previous tasks.
setup_context: The assistant-reflexion skill instructions are active.
The user asks for pre-task lesson recall.
The project and task type are known from context.
expected_behavior: Searches memory for project, project_type, task_type, and relevant technologies.
Filters lessons by relevance and confidence.
Returns recalled_lessons with lesson, confidence, date, and project.
Explains how high-confidence lessons affect discovery, planning, build, or review.
Does not fabricate lessons when memory has no matching results.
pass_criteria: The response identifies action as recall.
The response includes recalled_lessons or explicitly says none were found.
Each recalled lesson includes confidence, date, and project.
The response explains next-use impact for relevant lessons.
fail_signals: Skips memory search despite asking for recall.
Treats low-confidence stale lessons as mandatory.
